center.name: 科罗曼德尔半岛
center.summary: 科罗曼德尔半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Red-crowned parakeet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: On the mainland, this species occurs in large forest blocks in Northland, Coromandel and central North Island

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: On the mainland, this species occurs in large forest blocks in Northland, Coromandel and central North Island
